text.title: Solo Rate Floor Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to compute and defend the rate floor end-to-end.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.input: 7 inputs: target income, working_weeks, billable_pct (or 6mo history), tax_load, benefit_cost, tooling_cost, profit_margin
step.action: Validate ranges. Reject working_weeks > 46. Reject profit_margin < 0.15. Reject billable_pct > 0.55 unless historical data cited.
step.decision-gate: If any rejection cannot be reconciled with cited data → halt and request re-input.

step.name: apply-caps
step.action: Clamp billable_pct to 0.55. Clamp working_weeks to 46. Apply jurisdictional tax floor (US 0.32, EU 0.40, UK 0.30, CA 0.35, AU 0.30).

step.name: compute-floor
step.action: needed_revenue_pre_tax = (G + B + T) × (1 + m) / (1 - t). billable_hours = W × 40 × p. floor = needed_revenue / billable_hours.

step.name: sensitivity-bands
step.action: Compute floors at billable_pct − 10pp (low band) and + 10pp (high band, clamp to ≤0.65). Emit 3-band array.

step.name: defense-narrative
step.action: Compose ≤400 char narrative using MARKET language ("downtime, taxes, tooling, reinvestment margin"); NO personal income, NO personal expenses, NO mortgage references.
